name: onthecheap-mcp
description: Find free and cheap things to do in 14 US cities — daily event listings, deals and local guides from the On the Cheap network

otc_site.title: City
otc_site.description: Which On the Cheap site to read: charlotte, denver, atlanta, chicago, columbus, seattle, kansascity, miami, orlando, portland, richmond, southernmaine, triangle, or national. Defaults to charlotte.

otc_base_url.title: Site URL (advanced)
otc_base_url.description: Override with an explicit site URL instead of a city key. Leave blank unless you need a site not in the list. These sites are public — no credentials are needed.

tools.name: otc_list_events
tools.description: List events for a given day, with time, price and venue

tools.name: otc_events_month_overview
tools.description: Day-by-day overview of a month with true per-day counts

tools.name: otc_search_posts
tools.description: Search articles by text, category, location and date range

tools.name: otc_get_post
tools.description: Fetch one article in full as readable text or HTML

tools.name: otc_list_categories
tools.description: List article categories with ids and post counts

tools.name: otc_list_locations
tools.description: List local areas with ids and post counts

tools.name: otc_list_sites
tools.description: List the cities in the On the Cheap network

tools.name: otc_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify the configured site is reachable
